arts.ttl: Report: Nuri Şahin’s Last Chance Against Bologna; Erik ten Hag, Sebastian Hoeneß on BVB’s Shortlist
arts.sum: He also states that the club has already considered who could be Şahin’s replacement as BVB head coach, with Erik ten Hag and Sebastian Hoeneß both on the shortlist. Nuri Şahin is running out of time, and the club are already considering who could replace him.
